decision.overall_recommendation: VIX gate is open, but two things argue for real caution here: (1) this system's own tracked history (pick_track_record) shows a 0% win rate over the last 14 ranked picks with an average return of -8.91% and resolution in ~1.1 bars — a genuinely weak track record that should temper conviction regardless of how clean today's technical setups look, and (2) the account itself has only $119.02 of buying power against a $1,787.06 net-liq value, so the mechanically-computed 4%-risk position sizes below (many implying $1,000-$9,000 notional) are not actually executable at current cash levels — they are shown for completeness per the formula but would require either far smaller size, added capital, or a lower risk_per_trade_pct before any of these could be placed. The pullback/EMA200 pattern itself remains an unvalidated, if reasonable, candidate filter — it should not be treated as a proven edge on its own. Net: treat this as a monitor-and-stage-small list rather than a green light to deploy full size across the board. Among the picks, GDS, SBRA, CTRE, LCII and SUPN have the cleanest fundamental backdrops (consistent EPS beats and/or accelerating growth); several picks (HUN, GDS, HLF, GBX, KMT) carry StopSanityFlag risk (RR≥15:1, more likely a too-tight stop than a great target) and should be sized/stopped with extra caution; existing Webull positions (BNO, NEXT, HELP) are all logged under an 'Unknown' sector bucket so sector-concentration overlap with these picks can't be confirmed from the data provided.

ranked_picks.research_highlight: GDS has beaten EPS estimates in all 8 of the last 8 reported quarters (most recently 1.53 vs -0.03 est.), with revenue growth accelerating to +15.2% and net income swinging strongly positive on surging China AI-datacenter demand; analyst consensus is Buy (17 buy/1 strong buy vs 2 hold).
ranked_picks.rationale: Best fundamental profile in the batch — a perfect beat streak plus a real, ongoing AI-demand growth catalyst (up to 50B yuan in planned capex) — though margin pressure from utility costs and a below-consensus 2026 guide are real offsets worth watching.
flags: StopSanityFlag: RR of 16.69:1 more likely reflects a tight stop than an exceptional target — verify stop placement before sizing.
Computed position value ($3,342.54) far exceeds current account buying power ($119.02) — not executable at this size without more capital or a smaller risk allocation.
Earnings in 36 days — outside the immediate earnings window.

ranked_picks.rationale: One of the most consistent beat/meet records in the list combined with steady revenue growth and a clean news backdrop — a lower-drama, higher-confidence fundamental pick even though the RR (5.61) is modest.
